task_completion.description: Replace all instances of 'disaster recovery' with 'Disaster Recovery'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Find and Replace dialog box is open with 'disaster recovery' in the 'Find what' field and 'Disaster Recovery' in the 'Replace with' field, or a confirmation popup showing these replacements were made.

task_completion.description: Replace standalone instances of 'BCP' with 'Business Continuity Plan'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Find and Replace dialog box shows 'BCP' in the 'Find what' field (ideally with 'Find whole words only' checked) and 'Business Continuity Plan' in the 'Replace with' field.

task_completion.description: Replace all double spaces with single spaces
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Find and Replace dialog box shows two spaces in the 'Find what' field and one space in the 'Replace with' field, or a confirmation dialog showing spaces were replaced.
The Find and Replace dialog box is used for 'e-mail' -> 'email' and 'back-up' -> 'backup', or the document text is visibly updated to reflect these specific changes.

task_completion.description: Save the document in the Documents folder as 'DR_Plan_Final.docx'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Save As' dialog box is visible, the current directory is set to the 'Documents' library/folder, and the file name is typed as 'DR_Plan_Final.docx'.

task_completion.description: Confirm the document was successfully saved with the new name
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Microsoft Word title bar at the top of the application window displays 'DR_Plan_Final.docx', indicating the save operation was completed.

integrity.description: The agent used the Microsoft Word 2010 GUI to perform the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the actual Microsoft Word 2010 application interface, not a terminal, PowerShell script, or a basic text editor like Notepad.

integrity.description: The agent used the built-in Find and Replace utility rather than manual editing
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Find and Replace' dialog box (Ctrl+H) is visible in the screenshots, proving the agent used the automated tool to ensure all instances were caught.

integrity.description: The agent saved the file from within Word rather than just renaming it in the file explorer
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Save As' dialog within Microsoft Word is used, rather than right-clicking and renaming the file in Windows Explorer.

privileged_info_for_vlm: O*NET-SOC code 13-1199.04 corresponds to Business Continuity Planners in the Business and Financial Operations industry.
